description_long: This is a black wristwatch with a rectangular face and a simple, utilitarian design. The watch features a plastic or resin case and a matching black strap with multiple adjustment holes and a classic buckle closure. The dial is light-colored with minimalistic markings, a single thin hand, and small printed text, giving it a clean and understated appearance. The back of the watch case is metallic, likely stainless steel, and secured with visible screws. The strap appears flexible and durable, suitable for everyday urban use. The overall aesthetic is functional and modern, with no visible decorative embellishments.
description: A black wristwatch with a rectangular face, minimalist dial, and a simple black strap with a buckle closure. The design is functional and understated, suitable for daily urban wear.
description_view_0: The watch is shown from an angled top view, highlighting the curved black strap and the side of the rectangular case.
description_view_1: This side view displays the light-colored dial, minimal markings, and the full length of the black strap with its adjustment holes.
description_view_2: A side profile of the watch, emphasizing the thinness of the case and the curvature of the strap.
description_view_3: The back of the watch is visible, showing the metallic case back and the attachment points of the strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is rectangular and light-colored with minimal markings, featuring a single thin hand and small printed text. The design is minimalist with no numerals, indices, or decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Black plastic or resin strap with multiple adjustment holes and a classic buckle closure.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with a single thin hand and no visible complications or special features.
